exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query: SELECT DISTINCT "Index" FROM index_trade ORDER BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Index" FROM index_trade ORDER BY "Index";

args.query:
SELECT "Index",
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" = "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flat_days,
       COUNT(*) AS total_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','IXIC','NYA')
  AND substr("Date",1,4) = '2018'
GROUP BY "Index"
ORDER BY "Index";

exec_args.sql:
SELECT "Index",
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days,
       SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" = "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flat_days,
       COUNT(*) AS total_days
FROM index_trade
WHERE "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','IXIC','NYA')
  AND substr("Date",1,4) = '2018'
GROUP BY "Index"
ORDER BY "Index";
